title: Nigeria-UK Migration, Justice and Home Affairs dialogue 2025
body: "Building on the previous dialogue hosted in London in March 2024, agreement was reached on a number of key priority issues, including:   the return of individuals with no right to remain in either the UK or Nigeria to their respective countries promoting visa programmes that support UK-Nigeria trade and investment joint assessments of serious and organised crime threats   "

taxons.title: Entering and staying in the UK
